journeyIntro.overview: God of War Ragnarök is an epic action-adventure with 36 base game trophies (plus 12 free Valhalla DLC trophies, 48 total). Kratos and Atreus journey across all Nine Realms as Fimbulwinter ends and Ragnarök approaches. The platinum requires 100% completion — all collectibles, all favors, and defeating the optional endgame bosses King Hrólf and Gná the Matriarch. No difficulty trophy exists, so Story Mode is fully valid for the platinum.
journeyIntro.recommendedApproach: Play through all 17 main missions first on any difficulty, then use the in-game map and quest log for systematic post-game cleanup. Collect Muspelheim Seed Pieces from Svartalfheim Legendary Chests during the story to unlock Muspelheim early. Focus on Nornir Chests as you explore — they provide permanent max health and rage increases. Save fully upgrading an armor set for last after farming Muspelheim Trials for high-tier materials.
warnings: ZERO missable trophies — everything remains accessible after the story ends, including all collectibles and favors
Some collectibles (Lindwyrms, certain flowers, Crater content) only appear AFTER completing specific main story missions — do not worry if you cannot find them mid-story
Valhalla DLC is a free separate download — access it from the main menu after story completion, adds 12 extra trophies
Gná (The True Queen) and King Hrólf (Grave Mistake) are level 9 endgame bosses — fully upgrade your armor before attempting these fights
Muspelheim requires collecting two Seed Pieces from Legendary Chests in Svartalfheim — pick them up during your story playthrough to save time
PS4 to PS5 save transfer enables trophy auto-pop — loading a completed PS4 save on PS5 instantly unlocks all earned trophies

trophies.name: The Bear and the Wolf
trophies.guide: Earn all 35 other base game trophies to unlock the Platinum. With zero missable trophies and Story Mode available, this is one of the most accessible platinums in a major AAA action game.
trophies.walkthrough: Complete all 17 main missions, then systematically clean up all favors, collectibles, and optional bosses in post-game. Use the in-game map quest tracker to identify anything remaining in each realm.

trophies.name: Ragnarök
trophies.guide: Defeat Odin in the final boss fight of Main Quest 17. This is the story completion trophy and the narrative culmination of the entire game.
trophies.walkthrough: The fight against Odin is a multi-phase encounter in Asgard. He uses Bifröst attacks and reality-warping abilities. Stay aggressive during vulnerable phases and use Spartan Rage to deal burst damage. The final sequence is cinematic.

trophies.name: The True Queen
trophies.guide: Defeat Gná the Matriarch, the optional post-game Valkyrie Queen boss. She is the hardest fight in the base game — level 9 gear is strongly recommended.
trophies.walkthrough: Gná is found in Vanaheim after completing the main story. She has an enormous moveset borrowing from all previous Valkyrie fights plus new attacks of her own. Use Spartan Rage for burst damage windows. Runic attacks with stagger potential are most effective. Expect many attempts — she is a significant skill check.
trophies.farmingTip: Complete Muspelheim Trials repeatedly to farm the high-tier materials needed for level 9 armor upgrades before attempting Gná.

trophies.name: Spartan Ways
trophies.guide: Unlock all three Spartan Rage types — Rage of Fury, Rage of Calm, and Rage of Retribution. All three are awarded automatically through story progression during Main Quest 12.
trophies.walkthrough: Rage of Fury is available from the start. Rage of Calm and Rage of Retribution are both granted through story-related story events. No collectibles or side quests required — just continue the main quest.

trophies.name: Trials by Fire
trophies.guide: Complete all 15 Muspelheim combat trials in The Crucible arena. Trials feature special challenge conditions like 'Kill enemies using only Runic attacks' or 'Do not use Rage abilities'. This is the hardest activity in the game outside of endgame bosses.
trophies.walkthrough: First collect both Muspelheim Seed Pieces from Legendary Chests in Svartalfheim (one at Modvitnir's Rig, one in Alberich Hollow — the latter requires the Draupnir Spear from Main Quest 10). Travel to Muspelheim via any Mystic Gateway. Complete 6 initial trials at 3 swords, then 3 second-tier trials, then open the central Nornir Chest to unlock 6 final challenges at the central sword.
prerequisites: Both Muspelheim Seed Pieces from Svartalfheim
Draupnir Spear (from Main Quest 10: Forging Destiny)
trophies.farmingTip: Muspelheim Trials drop the best upgrade materials in the game. Replay them for Chaos Flames, Crests of Flame, and Primordial Embers needed for late-tier armor upgrades.

checklist.label: Sword 1 — Trial 1 (Onslaught)
checklist.notes: Defeat all enemies with any condition

checklist.label: Final Challenge 1
checklist.notes: Unlock by opening the central arena Nornir Chest

trophies.name: Full Belly
trophies.description: Obtain all Apples of Iðunn and Horns of Blood Mead
trophies.guide: Open all 35 Nornir Chests scattered across the Nine Realms. Apples of Iðunn increase Kratos's maximum health, Horns of Blood Mead increase his maximum Rage. Each chest is sealed with a rune puzzle — typically hitting three runes with your axe, lighting three braziers, or destroying three bell-like objects in the area.
trophies.walkthrough: Nornir Chests are spread across all realms accessible during and after the story. You do not need to collect every single apple/horn type — simply opening all 35 chests is sufficient. The in-game map shows undiscovered chests in regions you have visited. All 35 remain accessible post-story.

checklist.label: Svartalfheim Nornir Chests (8)
checklist.location: Svartalfheim — Bay of Bounty, Nidavellir, Aurvangar Wetlands

checklist.label: Vanaheim Nornir Chests (8)
checklist.location: Vanaheim — The Jungle, Crater, Sinkholes, Plains
checklist.notes: 8 total; several in the post-story Crater area

checklist.label: Muspelheim Nornir Chests (2)
checklist.notes: 2 total; one unlocked by completing initial trials

trophies.name: Collector
trophies.description: Obtain all Relics and Sword Hilts
trophies.guide: Collect or craft all 14 Relics and Sword Hilts. Some drop from boss fights, some are found in Legendary Chests, and several must be crafted at the blacksmith using Lost Pages (lore scrolls) and special enemy drop materials. You must craft an item — simply finding materials is not enough.
trophies.walkthrough: Check the blacksmith crafting menu regularly. Lost Pages unlock craftable relic recipes. The Hilt of Hofud is obtained by defeating Heimdall during the story. Work through all Favors and side quests as many relics are tied to quest rewards or hidden in optional areas.

checklist.label: Hilt of Skofnung
checklist.location: Craft at blacksmith — requires Lost Pages

checklist.label: Hilt of Gram
checklist.location: Craft at blacksmith — requires Lost Pages

checklist.label: Hilt of Hrotti
checklist.location: Craft at blacksmith — requires Lost Pages

checklist.label: Hilt of Hofud
checklist.location: Drops from Heimdall during Main Quest 13

checklist.label: Hilt of Forsbrandr
checklist.location: Craft at blacksmith — requires Lost Pages

checklist.label: Hilt of Ridill
checklist.location: Craft at blacksmith — requires Lost Pages

checklist.label: Hilt of Tyrfing
checklist.location: Craft at blacksmith — requires Lost Pages

trophies.name: Phalanx
trophies.guide: Collect all 5 shields for Kratos. Two are purchased from the blacksmith shop with Hacksilver, one is given automatically during the story, and two are found in Legendary Chests across the realms.
trophies.walkthrough: Shields each offer a different parry style and stat distribution. Purchase the Dauntless and Stone Wall shields from any blacksmith shop early in the game. The Guardian Shield is handed to Kratos by Sindri during the story. Find the Shatter Star Shield in Vanaheim and the Onslaught Shield in Helheim.

checklist.label: Guardian Shield
checklist.location: Automatic — given by Sindri during Main Quest 08: The Word of Fate

checklist.label: Dauntless Shield
checklist.notes: Available from early in the game

checklist.label: Stone Wall Shield
checklist.notes: Available from early in the game

checklist.label: Shatter Star Shield
checklist.location: Legendary Chest in Vanaheim – The Abandoned Village

checklist.label: Onslaught Shield
checklist.location: Legendary Chest immediately after Garm boss fight in Helheim
checklist.notes: Hard to miss — chest is directly in your path after the Garm fight

trophies.name: The Curator
trophies.guide: Find all 38 artifacts spread across the Nine Realms AND complete the 'Casualties of War' favor chain in Vanaheim's Crater region. Artifacts are physical objects — figurines, coins, keepsakes — found on the ground or in hidden nooks.
trophies.walkthrough: Artifacts are grouped into named collections per realm. The Casualties of War favor in The Crater has its own artifact set that only appears after unlocking the Crater. Use the map to track per-region completion. All artifacts remain collectable post-story.
prerequisites: Access to southern Vanaheim (The Crater) — unlocked after story progression

checklist.label: Midgard artifacts
checklist.location: Midgard — Lake of Nine and surrounding areas

checklist.label: Vanaheim artifacts (including Casualties of War)
checklist.location: Vanaheim — all areas including The Crater
checklist.notes: IMPORTANT: The Casualties of War favor artifact set is required — complete the full favor chain

trophies.name: The Librarian
trophies.guide: Collect all 14 Kvasir's Poems — glowing books hidden in obscure locations throughout the Nine Realms. Each poem is a clever, humorous tribute referencing another PlayStation exclusive game (Horizon, Returnal, Ghost of Tsushima, Death Stranding, etc.).
trophies.walkthrough: Kvasir's Poems glow with a distinctive light when near them. They are often hidden off the main path, behind environmental puzzles, or in tucked-away corners. They are not marked on the map. Use a dedicated collectibles guide for exact locations — these are some of the hardest collectibles to find without help.

checklist.label: Kvasir's Poem — Alfheim 1
checklist.notes: References Horizon Forbidden West / Zero Dawn

checklist.label: Kvasir's Poem — references Ghost of Tsushima
Kvasir's Poem 14
checklist.notes: Use a collectibles guide if stuck

trophies.name: The Florist
trophies.description: Collect one flower from each of the nine realms
trophies.guide: Collect one unique flower from each of the Nine Realms for the 'Nine Realms in Bloom' Favor. Each realm has exactly one flower to find — they appear as glowing collectible items in the environment.
trophies.walkthrough: This Favor is acquired early and tracked in your Favor log. Visit each accessible realm and look for the glowing flower collectible. Some realm flowers only become available after story events unlock new areas — you cannot complete this mid-story for all realms.
prerequisites: Story progression to access all Nine Realms

checklist.label: Asgard flower
checklist.notes: Accessible during or after the Asgard main quest sequence

checklist.label: Ironwood / Jotunheim flower
checklist.notes: Available after specific story events unlock this area

trophies.name: Ready for Commitment
trophies.guide: Upgrade all three pieces of one complete armor set (chest, wrists, waist) to level 9 at the blacksmith. All three pieces must belong to the same named set — you cannot mix and match pieces from different sets.
trophies.walkthrough: Level 9 upgrades require rare materials only obtainable from Muspelheim Trials and endgame enemies. The Berserker set or Steinbjörn set are common choices as their materials are farmable. Complete Muspelheim Trials repeatedly for Chaos Flames and Primordial Embers needed for the highest upgrade tiers.
trophies.farmingTip: Muspelheim Trials are the best farming source for level 7–9 upgrade materials. Replay the Final Challenges for the best drop rates.

trophies.name: Dragon Slayer
trophies.description: Craft the Dragon Scaled Armor Set
trophies.guide: Craft all three pieces of the Dragon Scaled Armor Set at the blacksmith. This set requires Luminous Alloy obtained from defeating dragon-type enemies in Vanaheim's Crater region.
trophies.walkthrough: Complete the Invasive Species Crater Hunts in southern Vanaheim — dragon enemies are the primary source of Luminous Alloy. After collecting enough alloy, take it to Lunda at her blacksmith shop to craft all three armor pieces.
prerequisites: Access to Vanaheim's Crater region (unlocked via story after 'Creatures of Prophecy')
trophies.farmingTip: Each Crater Hunt yields Luminous Alloy. Complete all 9 hunts and you should have enough material to craft the full set.

checklist.label: Craft Dragon Scaled Chest Armor
checklist.notes: Requires Luminous Alloy from Crater dragon enemies

checklist.label: Craft Dragon Scaled Wrist Armor
checklist.notes: Requires Luminous Alloy from Crater dragon enemies

checklist.label: Craft Dragon Scaled Waist Armor
checklist.notes: Requires Luminous Alloy from Crater dragon enemies

trophies.name: How It's Going
trophies.description: Fully repair the Amulet of Yggdrasil
trophies.guide: Collect all 9 Jewels of Yggdrasil to fully repair the Amulet — adding new enchantment slots with each jewel. Jewels are found in Nornir Chests, as boss drops, and scattered across the realms.
trophies.walkthrough: The Amulet of Yggdrasil is granted during the story. Open the Equipment menu to check how many jewels you have. Nornir Chests are the most common source. All jewels are available post-story if any are missed during the playthrough.

trophies.name: Invasive Species
trophies.guide: Complete all 9 Crater Hunts in Vanaheim's Crater region — 2 Epic Hunts and 7 Dragon Hunts. The Crater is a large open area in southern Vanaheim, unlocked via the 'Scent of Survival' Favor after completing the main quest 'Creatures of Prophecy'.
trophies.walkthrough: Hunt markers appear across The Crater's subregions (Sinkholes, Jungle, Plains). Epic Hunts involve confronting the largest dragon-type bosses in the area. Dragon Hunts involve tracking and defeating medium-sized dragons. Defeating dragons also yields Luminous Alloy for the Dragon Slayer armor.
prerequisites: Complete 'Scent of Survival' Favor to unlock The Crater
trophies.farmingTip: Collect all Luminous Alloy drops from dragons during these hunts — you need it for the Dragon Slayer armor trophy.

trophies.name: Rightful Place
trophies.guide: Capture all 6 Lindwyrms (large wyvern-like creatures) using Ratatoskr's special traps and return them to the squirrel god at Yggdrasil. Each Lindwyrm is located in a different realm.
trophies.walkthrough: Ratatoskr assigns you this Favor via Yggdrasil. Lindwyrm locations are marked on your map once the Favor is active. Each Lindwyrm encounter involves a puzzle-like trap setup before engaging the creature. Speak to Ratatoskr after collecting all 6 to complete the quest.

trophies.name: Pure of Hart
trophies.description: Return the Stags of the Four Seasons
trophies.guide: Find and return all 4 lost Stags of the Seasons (Winter, Spring, Summer, Autumn) for the 'A Stag for All Seasons' Favor in Vanaheim's Crater region.
trophies.walkthrough: This Favor is available in The Crater area of southern Vanaheim — it is not accessible until The Crater is unlocked post-story (or mid-story via specific quests). Each stag is found in a different subregion of the Crater. Approach and interact with each stag to capture it, then return to the Favor giver after all 4 are found.

trophies.name: A Grizzly Encounter
trophies.guide: Defeat the bear (Björn) boss in Main Quest 01. This is the opening major boss fight of the game and unlocks automatically through story progression.
trophies.walkthrough: The bear fight serves as a combat tutorial. Stay mobile, use Leviathan Axe frost throws, and dodge its heavy charging swipes. Watch for the large lunging bite attack — sidestep to avoid it and counter.

trophies.name: Blood Debt
trophies.guide: Battle Thor in the dramatic opening confrontation of Main Quest 01. One of the most memorable moments in the game — unlocks automatically through story progress.
trophies.walkthrough: Thor fights with Mjölnir using lightning-charged slams and powerful grabs. This early encounter is designed to be dramatic and set a tone — focus on learning his patterns rather than worrying about difficulty.

trophies.name: The Cauldron
trophies.guide: Defeat the witch Grýla and destroy her cursed cauldron in Main Quest 05 (The Lost Sanctuary in Ironwood). Unlocks automatically through story progress.
trophies.walkthrough: Grýla uses ice-based attacks and her massive cauldron as both a weapon and shield. During the fight, damage the cauldron mechanism to trigger new phases. After disabling the cauldron, finish off Grýla in the final phase.

trophies.name: Backyard Brawl
trophies.guide: Battle Vanadís (a Valkyrie) at the start of Main Quest 06. This fight introduces Freya as a combat partner and unlocks the Blades of Chaos for Kratos. Unlocks automatically.
trophies.walkthrough: Vanadís uses fast wing attacks, spear throws, and aerial dive attacks. Learn her telegraphs — she broadcasts most moves clearly. This fight progresses the story regardless of outcome.

trophies.name: Root of the Problem
trophies.guide: Defeat the massive serpent Níðhögg in Main Quest 06 (Groa's Secret). A large-scale boss fight in Alfheim with Freya's assistance. Unlocks automatically.
trophies.walkthrough: Níðhögg is a multi-segmented serpent boss fought in an Alfheim arena. Use the Blades of Chaos for consistent damage. Target weak spots on its body segments when exposed. Freya assists with ranged attacks.

trophies.name: Off the Leash
trophies.guide: Defeat Garm, the great cosmic wolf of Helheim, in Main Quest 12. A dramatic and emotional story boss tied to Atreus's personal journey.
trophies.walkthrough: Garm is a colossal wolf in Helheim. It uses frost and bite attacks and can summon ice shockwaves. Use Blades of Chaos fire attacks to exploit its frost-type weakness. The Onslaught Shield Legendary Chest is right after this fight.

trophies.name: Comeuppance
trophies.guide: Defeat Heimdall the Watchman God in Main Quest 13. A satisfying boss fight against the arrogant gatekeeper of Asgard who has been taunting Kratos throughout the story.
trophies.walkthrough: Heimdall can predict and dodge attacks due to his foresight — use the Draupnir Spear's unique Bifröst-infused property which bypasses his precognition. The fight has multiple phases. His Hilt of Hofud relic drops from this fight.
prerequisites: Draupnir Spear (obtained during story prior to this quest)

trophies.name: Better Together
trophies.guide: Defeat the twin Valkyries Hrist and Mist simultaneously in Main Quest 16 (The Realms at War). A challenging dual-boss fight requiring careful management of two aggressive enemies.
trophies.walkthrough: Hrist uses spear-based attacks; Mist uses sword attacks. Try to use Runic attacks to stagger one while focusing the other. Avoid being flanked by both at once. Use terrain and Spartan Rage strategically when one is nearly defeated.

trophies.name: Grave Mistake
trophies.guide: Defeat King Hrólf Kraki, the Berserker King — an optional post-game superboss found in Midgard after clearing all 12 Berserker Gravestones across the Nine Realms. One of the hardest fights in the base game.
trophies.walkthrough: King Hrólf combines attack patterns from all 12 previous Berserker fights plus his own powerful unique abilities. He hits extremely hard and has rapid phase transitions. Maximize armor to level 9 before attempting. Recommended: Spartan Rage of Retribution for burst damage windows, and a high-stagger Runic attack.
prerequisites: Defeat all 12 Berserker Gravestones across the Nine Realms
trophies.farmingTip: Farm Muspelheim Trials to upgrade armor to level 9 before this fight.

checklist.label: Defeat King Hrólf Kraki — Midgard
checklist.notes: Unlocks after defeating all 12 berserkers — final encounter of this questline

trophies.name: How It Started
trophies.guide: Equip any enchantment gem into the Amulet of Yggdrasil. This unlocks automatically during Main Quest 06 when the Amulet is first given to Kratos.
trophies.walkthrough: Upon receiving the Amulet during the story, open the Equipment menu, navigate to the Amulet section, and slot in any enchantment from your inventory. Trophy unlocks immediately.

trophies.name: Spit Shine
trophies.guide: Upgrade any single armor piece by one level at a blacksmith shop. This unlocks very early in the game — simply collect a few crafting materials from chests and enemies, then visit Brok or Sindri.
trophies.walkthrough: Brok is in Sindri's House in Svartalfheim from the start of the game. Collect the cheap upgrade materials dropped by enemies or found in red chests, then upgrade any starting armor piece at his shop.

trophies.name: Knock off the Rust
trophies.guide: Spend XP to purchase any skill from the Skills menu. You earn XP from combat kills and exploration discoveries — buy the very first available skill you see.
trophies.walkthrough: Open the Skills menu (accessible from the pause menu or via L3+R3 shortcut). Select any available skill, check the XP cost, and confirm purchase. This should unlock naturally within the first 30 minutes of gameplay.

trophies.name: Funeral for a Friend
trophies.guide: Complete the 'A Viking Funeral' Favor in Svartalfheim after finishing the main story. This emotionally resonant side quest is a farewell to one of the game's most beloved characters.
trophies.walkthrough: Travel to the tavern in Nidavellir, Svartalfheim, after completing the main campaign. The Favor activates there and involves a brief story sequence. A must-see post-game moment.

trophies.name: Rebel Leader
trophies.description: Return the Hammer of the Rebellion
trophies.guide: Complete the 'Spirit of Rebellion' Favor in Svartalfheim by recovering the legendary Hammer of the Rebellion for Durlin the dwarf leader.
trophies.walkthrough: After obtaining the Draupnir Spear (Main Quest 10), speak to Durlin to begin this Favor. Travel to Dragon Beach in the Bay of Bounty, Nidavellir. Climb the scaffolding on the far cliffside, then use the Rune Slate at the top to activate runic magic on a massive stone hammer at the end of the bridge. The hammer lifts to reveal a hidden chest — collect the Hammer of the Rebellion inside and return it to Durlin.
prerequisites: Draupnir Spear from Main Quest 10: Forging Destiny

trophies.name: New Friends
trophies.guide: Complete 'The Mysterious Orb' Favor in Vanaheim for Lúnda the travelling blacksmith. Retrieve her stolen magical orb and return it.
trophies.walkthrough: Speak to Lúnda in Vanaheim to begin the Favor. The orb's location is in The Veiled Passage, a region in southern Vanaheim only accessible after unlocking the post-story open Vanaheim area. Retrieve the orb and return it to Lúnda to unlock her as a full blacksmith.

trophies.name: Full Gufa
trophies.guide: Complete the 'Secret of the Sands' and its follow-up 'Song of the Sands' Favor chain to free two Hafgufas — enormous whale-like sea creatures trapped beneath the desert sands of Alfheim.
trophies.walkthrough: Sindri gives you 'Secret of the Sands' sometime after Main Quest 4. The quest is set in Alfheim's Forbidden Sands region. Solving the first Favor frees one Hafgufa and unlocks the chained follow-up Favor. Complete both to free both creatures and earn the trophy.

trophies.name: Making Amends
trophies.guide: Complete 'The Weight of Chains' Favor in Svartalfheim by freeing the Lyngbakr — a colossal island-turtle creature that has been bound in chains by Odin.
trophies.walkthrough: Travel to Lyngbakr Island in Svartalfheim's Bay of Bounty. The Favor involves a multi-part environmental puzzle — each chain binding the creature is severed by solving a spatial puzzle in the surrounding volcanic rock areas. There are three chains to break. The creature's liberation is one of the game's most satisfying Favor conclusions.

trophies.name: It Was a Good Day
trophies.guide: Complete 'Freya's Missing Peace' Favor by helping Freya find and reclaim Mardöll — her original spear confiscated by Odin. A multi-stage quest across multiple realms.
trophies.walkthrough: Speak to Freya at Sindri's house to begin this Favor. The quest tracks Mardöll across several realms via clues. Completing it provides meaningful character closure for Freya's arc and rewards worthwhile gear. Available after Freya joins your party mid-story.

trophies.name: Besties
trophies.guide: Pet the two polar bear cubs Speki and Svanna as part of the 'Animal Instincts' Favor from Ratatoskr. One of the most endearing trophies in the game.
trophies.walkthrough: The 'Animal Instincts' Favor is given by Ratatoskr via Yggdrasil. Speki and Svanna are the bear cubs who pull Kratos and Atreus's sled throughout the game. Simply interact with them when given the chance and follow the Favor's short prompts.

suggestedOrder.description: Play all 17 main missions on any difficulty — Story Mode is perfectly valid for the platinum. Collect Legendary Chests, Nornir Chests, and artifacts as you naturally encounter them. Most importantly: pick up both Muspelheim Seed Pieces from Svartalfheim Legendary Chests (Modvitnir's Rig and Alberich Hollow) to unlock Muspelheim early.

Complete all Favors (side quests) across all realms. Key ones for trophies: A Viking Funeral (Svartalfheim — story-gated until after the main quest), The Weight of Chains / Lyngbakr (Svartalfheim), Freya's Missing Peace, Spirit of Rebellion, The Mysterious Orb (Vanaheim), Secret of the Sands + Song of the Sands (Alfheim), Animal Instincts (Ratatoskr's bear cub favor), all 6 Lindwyrm captures.

suggestedOrder.phase: Vanaheim Crater — Hunts, Stags & Dragons (5–8 hours)
suggestedOrder.description: Unlock The Crater via the 'Scent of Survival' Favor. Complete all 9 Crater Hunts for Invasive Species. Find all 4 Stags of the Seasons for Pure of Hart. Collect Luminous Alloy from dragon enemies for the Dragon Slayer armor set.

Systematically collect everything remaining using the in-game map per-realm tracker: 35 Nornir Chests (Full Belly), 14 Kvasir's Poems (The Librarian), 38 Artifacts + Casualties of War favor (The Curator), 5 Shields (Phalanx), 14 Relics/Sword Hilts including crafted ones (Collector), 9 Realm Flowers (The Florist), all 9 Jewels of Yggdrasil (How It's Going).

Complete all 15 Muspelheim Trials in The Crucible for Trials by Fire. This area also provides the best materials for upgrading armor — complete the trials at least twice to stock up on Chaos Flames and Primordial Embers needed for level 9 upgrades.

Farm Muspelheim Trials for resources to fully upgrade all three pieces of one armor set to level 9 (Ready for Commitment). Then challenge the two hardest fights in the game: defeat all 12 Berserker Gravestones and then King Hrólf Kraki (Grave Mistake); and defeat Gná the Matriarch in Vanaheim (The True Queen). Expect multiple attempts for both.

Download and play the free Valhalla DLC roguelite mode for 12 additional trophies including the gold 'God of Hope' trophy. Accessible from the main menu after story completion. Requires replaying and mastering a roguelite-style Muspelheim arena progression with Kratos.
